name: Innkeeper Morel
greeting: The stout innkeeper looks up from wiping the bar. 'Welcome to the Rusty Flagon! What can I do for you, traveller?'

dialogue.response: 'We've a cozy room upstairs for five gold. Warm bed, no fleas — mostly.' He gives a sheepish grin.
'Terrible business. They've been raiding the forest road — merchants won't travel after dark anymore. The Mayor's posted a bounty, I hear.'
'If you're handy with a blade, try the Guild Hall. Hendricks is always looking for capable folk to handle the... rougher problems around town.'
'Good honest folk here. We've had harder times — the dam flooding nearly wiped out the lower district five years back. But we rebuilt.'
